name: Netskope DLP
description: Integrates with Netskope REST API v2 for DLP alert retrieval, incident monitoring, policy management, and cloud application data security

actions.name: Get DLP Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve DLP alerts from Netskope with filtering by time range, severity, and alert type

parameters.name: starttime
parameters.description: Start time as epoch timestamp in seconds

parameters.name: endtime
parameters.description: End time as epoch timestamp in seconds

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

actions.name: Get DLP Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve DLP incidents with details about policy violations, sensitive data matches, and affected users

parameters.name: starttime
parameters.description: Start time as epoch timestamp in seconds

parameters.name: endtime
parameters.description: End time as epoch timestamp in seconds

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

actions.name: Get DLP Events
actions.description: Retrieve DLP-specific event data including file operations and data transfer events

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Filter query string for DLP events

parameters.name: starttime
parameters.description: Start time as epoch timestamp in seconds

parameters.name: endtime
parameters.description: End time as epoch timestamp in seconds

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: List DLP Profiles
actions.description: Retrieve all configured DLP profiles and their associated rules

actions.name: List DLP Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all DLP rules associated with configured policies

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Filter rules by specific DLP profile ID

actions.name: Get UCI Impact Score
actions.description: Retrieve User Confidence Index impact scores related to DLP policy violations

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: User email or identifier to query

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return
